name: yubikey
title: YubiKey
description: TOTP codes, FIDO2 passkeys and PIV certificates from your YubiKey, fully native with no external dependencies
author: LLawli

commands.name: otp-codes
commands.title: OTP Codes
commands.subtitle: YubiKey
commands.description: List the YubiKey's TOTP codes and paste the selected one into the focused field

commands.name: security-keys
commands.title: Keys & Certificates
commands.subtitle: YubiKey
commands.description: Manage FIDO2 passkeys, PIV slots and certificates on the YubiKey

preferences.name: pcscSocket
preferences.title: pcscd socket
preferences.description: Path to the pcscd socket. Leave empty to use the system default (/run/pcscd/pcscd.comm).

preferences.name: serial
preferences.title: YubiKey serial
preferences.description: Pin the extension to a specific key. Leave empty to use the first one found.

preferences.name: purgeClipboardHistory
preferences.title: Remove codes from clipboard history
preferences.description: Pasting a code writes it to Vicinae's clipboard history. With this on, the entry is removed right after.
preferences.label: Delete the history entry after pasting

preferences.name: touchTimeout
preferences.title: Touch wait time
preferences.description: Seconds to wait for the touch before giving up.
